title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXIX. Natural History.
content:
There was a piper, he'd a cow,
            And he'd no hay to give her
        He took his pipes and played a tune,
            Consider, old cow, consider!

        The cow considered very well,
            For she gave the piper a penny,
        That he might play the tune again,
            Of corn rigs are bonnie!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXXIX. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
